tagline: Licensed plumbing repair, water heaters, and drain service for homes and businesses across Henry County.
address: 255 Shoal Creek Rd, Locust Grove, GA 30248
services_intro: From a midnight burst pipe to a planned water heater swap, T & G Plumbing keeps Locust Grove flowing — licensed work, fair pricing, and a crew that shows up.
service_1_desc: 24/7 response for burst pipes, leaks, and clogged drains across Henry County.
service_2_desc: Repair and replacement of tank and tankless water heaters for homes and businesses.
service_3_desc: Water leak detection, rooter service, and sewer line clearing to keep things flowing.
review_1_quote: Called when our water heater quit on a Sunday — walked through it on the phone, came out fast, and had hot water back the same day. Honest about the cost up front.
review_2_quote: Had a slab leak we couldn't find. The crew located it, fixed it clean, and the price was fair. The kind of plumber you keep on speed dial.
review_3_quote: Main line backed up before a holiday — cleared it, explained what caused it, and didn't push extras I didn't need. Professional from start to finish.
about_paragraph: T & G Plumbing is a licensed plumbing company serving Locust Grove and the surrounding Henry County area. From emergency repairs and burst pipes to water heater installs, leak detection, and drain cleaning, we handle the jobs that keep a home or business running. Our crew shows up when we say we will, explains the work in plain terms, and quotes the price before we start — no surprises. With a 4.3-star rating from 72 reviews on Google and an A+ rating with the BBB since 2016, we've earned the trust of neighbors across the county. Give us a call and let's get it fixed right the first time.
